title: Donguler (for/while/foreach)
subtitle: Farkli dongu turlerinin kullanimi.
code:
<?php

// for dongusu
echo "1'den 5'e kadar:\n";
for ($i = 1; $i <= 5; $i++) {
    echo "Sayi: " . $i . "\n";
}

// while dongusu
echo "\nGeri sayim:\n";
$counter = 5;
while ($counter > 0) {
    echo $counter . "\n";
    $counter--;
}

// foreach dongusu
echo "\nMeyveler:\n";
$fruits = ["Elma", "Armut", "Muz", "Karpuz"];
foreach ($fruits as $fruit) {
    echo "- " . $fruit . "\n";
}

// foreach ile indeks
echo "\nIndeksli liste:\n";
foreach ($fruits as $index => $fruit) {
    echo $index . ": " . $fruit . "\n";
}

// do-while dongusu
echo "\nDo-while ornegi:\n";
$n = 0;
do {
    echo "n = " . $n . "\n";
    $n++;
} while ($n < 3);

?>
